reference: Hi, I am twenty-five years old. I had a miscarriage in February two thousand and twelve, and I got pregnant again in July. During my period, I had sexual intercourse and became pregnant. In March two thousand and thirteen, I gave birth at eight months via cesarean section. The baby had abnormalities with the heart, kidneys, and liver. The baby stayed in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit for a month and died on April twelve, two thousand and thirteen. Now, nine months later, I am having trouble getting pregnant. Please help.
text: Hi, I am 25 years old. I had a miscarriage in February 2012, and I got pregnant again in July. During my period, I had sexual intercourse and became pregnant. In March 2013, I gave birth at 8 months via serine section. The baby had abnormalities with the heart, kidneys, and liver. The baby stayed in the neonatal intensive care unit for a month and died on April 12, 2013. Now, 9 months later, I am having trouble getting pregnant. Please help.
